## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Environment

- Game Version: [e.g. v1.0.0]
- Node.js: [e.g. 18.x]

Paste relevant logs here

## Screenshots
